case_title: IRINA BUSEL et al VS. BRYAN LAYTON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

DECLARATION OF IRINA BUSEL RE OEX HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUSEL, IRINA

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $400.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $192.08 ACCRUED INTEREST, $102.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF BUSEL, IRINA BUSEL, NIKOLAY

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUSEL, IRINA BUSEL, NIKOLAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAYTON, BRYAN $3,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $76.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,826.50, DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-12-2010 IS CONTINUED TO NOV-15-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES AGREE THAT JUDGMENT DEBTOR WILL PAY $150 PER MONTH STARTING AUG-03-2010 AND THE 3RD OF EACH MONTH FOR 6 MONTHS. AFTER THAT JUDGMENT DEBTOR WILL PAY $100 PER MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL. CONTINUE TO NOV-15-2010 AT 11 AM FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUE IN 3 MONTH INTERVALS. BENCH LETTER IS WITHDRAWN.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-04-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR - DUPLICATE ENTRY.
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUSEL, IRINA BUSEL, NIKOLAY PETITION MAILED ON OCT 13, 2010
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS SET FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGEMENT SIGNED & FILED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LAYTON, BRYAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BUSEL, IRINA BUSEL, NIKOLAY AS TO DEFENDANT LAYTON, BRYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2009 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO MAR-25-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFT TO PAY $100 PER MONTH STARTING JAN. 15, 2010. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE EVERY 3 MONTHS FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO PAYMENT IS RECEIVED, PLAINTIFF CAN ADVANCED COURT DATE. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE TODAY.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2010 IS CONTINUED TO JUL-12-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE DURING DEC. 3, 2010 HEARING.
